examples.question: Which film came out earlier, Blushing Charlie or Los Paquetes De Paquita?
examples.hop1_text: Blushing Charlie is a 1970 Swedish drama film directed by Vilgot Sjöman. It was entered into the 21st Berlin International Film Festival.
examples.hop2_text: Los Paquetes de Paquita(" The Packages of Paquita") is a 1955 Mexican film. It stars Carlos Orellana.

examples.question: When was Ludwig Gruno Of Hesse-Homburg's father born?
examples.hop1_text: Ludwig Johann Wilhelm Gruno von Hessen-Homburg (15 January 1705 – 23 October 1745) was hereditary prince of Hesse-Homburg and an Imperial Russian field marshal. He was the eldest surviving son of Frederick III, Landgrave of Hesse-Homburg and his wife...
examples.hop2_text: Frederick III James of Hesse-Homburg (born 19 May 1673 in Cölln; died: 8 June 1746 in 's-Hertogenbosch) was a Landgrave of Hesse-Homburg

examples.question: Who is the paternal grandfather of George De Salis?
examples.hop1_text: George Fane De Salis (1851 – 30 December 1931) was an Australian politician. He was born on Darbalara Station near Gundagai to pastoralist Leopold Fane De Salis and Charlotte Macdonald. He received a private education and then farmed at Tharwa and Mi...
examples.hop2_text: Leopold Fabius Dietegen Fane de Salis, (26 April 1816 – 20 November 1898) was a Tuscan-born Australian pastoralist and politician. Born in Florence to Jerome, 4th Count de Salis-Soglio and Henrietta Foster, he attended Eton College and studied sheep ...

examples.question: What is the place of birth of Duke Louis Of Württemberg's father?
examples.hop1_text: Duke Louis of Württemberg ("Ludwig Friedrich Alexander") (Treptow an der Rega, 30 August 1756 – Kirchheim unter Teck, 20 September 1817) was the second son of Frederick II Eugene, Duke of Württemberg (1732–1797) and Margravine Sophia Dorothea of Bran...
examples.hop2_title: Frederick II Eugene, Duke of Württemberg
examples.hop2_text: Friedrich Eugen, Duke of Württemberg (21 January 1732 – 23 December 1797) was the fourth son of Karl Alexander, Duke of Württemberg, and Princess Maria Augusta of Thurn and Taxis (11 August 1706 – 1 February 1756). He was born in Stuttgart. From 1795...
